headline: Truist Financial’s (NYSE:TFC) Q2 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: Financial services company Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) reported Q2 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 4.3% year on year to $5.27 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.23 per share was 13.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Truist Financial’s (NYSE:TFC) Q2 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
content.summary: Financial services company Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) reported Q2 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 4.3% year on year to $5.27 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.23 per share was 13.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Truist Financial Earnings Beat Estimates but Eyes Are on Bank’s Next Chapter
summary: Truist Financial delivered strong second-quarter earnings Friday, but investors may be more focused on what the leadership transition to incoming CEO Michael Lyons could mean for the bank’s strategy.

content.title: Truist Financial Earnings Beat Estimates but Eyes Are on Bank’s Next Chapter
content.summary: Truist Financial delivered strong second-quarter earnings Friday, but investors may be more focused on what the leadership transition to incoming CEO Michael Lyons could mean for the bank’s strategy.

headline: Truist’s Rogers: Lyons CEO appointment brings ‘certainty’

headline: Truist culls some consumer loans, cites long-term strategy
summary: The Charlotte, North Carolina-based bank stopped originating marine and recreational vehicle loans during the second quarter. Executives said the change will reduce net interest income in the short term, but deliver higher profitability over the long run.

content.summary: The Charlotte, North Carolina-based bank stopped originating marine and recreational vehicle loans during the second quarter. Executives said the change will reduce net interest income in the short term, but deliver higher profitability over the long run.
